name: Warm Mashed Potato and Bacon Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Escarole lettuce, chopped into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put potatoes and garlic in a medium saucepan. Add chicken broth and enough cold water to cover. Cover and cook for 10-12 minutes until potatoes are tender.
2. Meanwhile, fry bacon in a heavy skillet until crisp; drain on paper towels.
3. Remove and reserve 3/4 cup of the potato cooking liquid. Drain potatoes and garlic well in a colander.
4. Return potatoes and garlic to the pot and stir for 1-2 minutes over medium heat until they are dry.
5. Mash potatoes and garlic, adding reserved cooking liquid, 2 tbsp of olive oil, 1/2 tsp of salt, and 1/4 tsp of pepper.
6. In a small bowl, mix remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil, red-wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, 1/4 tsp each salt and pepper.
7. Put escarole, onions, and bacon in a large serving bowl. Add dressing and toss to coat. Mound potatoes on top of the salad and serve immediately.
